message.content:
(1) The visible section is a **timeline of professional roles** (2022–2025) with job titles, years, and descriptions.  
(2) The 3D character is **no longer visible** (scrolled past).  
(3) Cards are laid out in a **vertical timeline format**: each card has a role (e.g., "AI Engineer"), year (e.g., "2025"), and descriptive text, aligned left with years on the right, separated by a vertical purple line.
